overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunlit urban street in Night City. The character briefly engages in combat by firing at an aerial drone before continuing past construction zones, murals, and commercial storefronts toward a large intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with construction barriers and NCPD graffiti wall

events.description: character draws handgun and fires at flying drone hovering in the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, then drawing a weapon to shoot at an aerial target overhead before continuing

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle or drone hovering above the street being targeted

entered.detail: orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the sidewalk edge
concrete wall with NCPD and Keep Hope graffiti tags
piles of garbage bags and debris next to the construction zone
large vertical mural of a robed figure with golden halo on red building wall
elevated pedestrian bridge spanning across the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunlit urban sidewalk bordered by construction barriers and a graffiti-tagged wall. The character walks forward, then stops to draw a handgun and fire at a flying drone overhead. The street is lined with parked cars and trees on the left, while a large religious mural becomes visible on the right wall as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with large religious mural and commercial diner storefront

events.description: passing from construction zone to area dominated by large religious mural on building wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the inclined sidewalk past the mural and approaching the diner entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: commercial storefront with circular neon sign reading Tom's Diner

segments.scene_description: Walking past the construction zone, the character moves alongside a massive religious mural painted on a red building wall. The scene transitions to a commercial area featuring Tom's Diner with its distinctive neon signage. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions on the inclined sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: inclined street approaching overhead walkway with increased pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking up the sloping sidewalk past various pedestrians and approaching the overpass

notable_agents.action: muscular pedestrian in gray tank top walking ahead in same direction
pedestrian in yellow shirt walking opposite direction

entered.detail: tall red concrete wall with various graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the inclined sidewalk past Tom's Diner, with a red building wall now dominating the right side. More pedestrians appear, walking in both directions. The overhead walkway bridge looms larger ahead as the character approaches it, while the street remains lined with trees and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under overhead walkway with digital billboards

events.description: walking under the overhead bridge into shadow then emerging back into sunlight
character turns right at the intersection to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure and turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying advertisements above the street
brutalist concrete structure with exterior staircases

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the overhead walkway bridge, experiencing a brief shadow before emerging into a wider intersection. Large digital billboards dominate the view ahead, and a concrete building with stairs appears on the right. The character then turns right at the intersection, navigating around pedestrians and bollards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban corridor that evolves from a gritty construction zone into a bustling commercial intersection. It begins on a sidewalk bordered by barriers and graffiti, where the character stops to fire a handgun at a flying drone before moving past a large religious mural on a red building wall. As the character progresses, the scene shifts toward a commercial district featuring the neon signage of Tom's Diner and an increasing flow of pedestrians on an inclined walkway. The camera then follows the character as they pass under the shadow of an overhead bridge, emerging into a wide, bright intersection dominated by massive digital billboards. Finally, the view turns right at the crossing, navigating around bollards and pedestrians toward a concrete building with stairs.
